title: stevia minor
intro: Stevia minor, also known as the Paraguayan sweetleaf, is a plant species that belongs to the Stevia genus of flowering plants in the sunflower family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. Stevia minor has various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, lowering blood sugar levels, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
